changes.value:
## What
Add a `tools_override: Option<String>` field to `SpawnConfig` in `claude-agent/src/claude_process.rs` that maps to `--tools <value>` on the Claude CLI command line.

For validators, we pass `--tools ""` to disable ALL built-in Claude tools (Read, Write, Bash, Edit, etc.). Combined with `--strict-mcp-config` (already implemented), this means the validator agent has ONLY the MCP tools we provide — nothing else.

**Files:**
- `claude-agent/src/claude_process.rs` — add `tools_override` to `SpawnConfig`, add `configure_tools` method
- `claude-agent/src/config.rs` — add `tools_override: Option<String>` to `ClaudeConfig`
- `claude-agent/src/agent.rs` — propagate the field from `AgentConfig` to `SpawnConfig`

**Approach:**
- Add `tools_override: Option<String>` to `SpawnConfig`
- In `ClaudeProcess::spawn()`, if `tools_override` is `Some(val)`, add `--tools <val>` to args
- Thread it through from `AgentConfig` → `ClaudeConfig` → `SpawnConfig`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `SpawnConfig.tools_override = Some("".to_string())` produces `--tools ""` in CLI args
- [ ] `SpawnConfig.tools_override = None` adds no --tools flag (backward compat)
- [ ] Field propagates from AgentConfig through to the spawn command

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: spawn config with tools_override produces correct args
- [ ] Unit test: spawn config without tools_override has no --tools flag
- [ ] `cargo test -p claude-agent`
Add --tools flag support to ClaudeProcess spawn config
